DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT TONY GARNICKI, OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LLC DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the fraud cause of action is sustained with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts, not conclusions in support of each element of each cause of action as to each defendant. Plaintiff to allege as to each specific representation - the representation, to whom by whom, how and when it was made; that representation was untrue at the time it was made; that Plaintiff reasonably relied on such representation; and that Plaintiff was damaged. All amendments to be on bold font. General statements and conclusions are not enough, assertions like "successful flipper," "safe investment," and "quick return" are not sufficient. The Court also notes that the facts of the complaint appear to indicate that Plaintiff was a lender, however Plaintiff keeps referring to an "investment" and comparing this loan "past investors." If Plaintiff uses the terms "lender" and "investor" interchangeably, Plaintiff should pick just one term to avoid the confusion, especially as it relates to reasonable reliance on representation regarding repayments of loans as compared to payments made to past investors.
Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of contract is overruled. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that (1) a demurrer may be sustained only to a part of cause of action, i.e. there is no basis for demurrer to the breach of contact regarding the principal on the loan; and (2) usury interest may properly be addressed on demurrer, i.e. none of the cases cited were resolved on a demurrer. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
